rationale: Both evaluations land on an identical score (3/10) and cite the same substantive concerns — basic German below the C1 minimum, missing executive leadership and team management, and no UML/IT security/compliance experience. The only difference is reworded justification and strengths (e.g., naming GISCollective vs. a generic example), which is ordinary run-to-run phrasing variation rather than any penalty or shift tied to the employer-name change. Neither version disadvantages the candidate for the employer names involved.
